title: Wire project memory updates into lifecycle commands
description: The repo can now write tasks, goals, and the recent confirmation window through dedicated commands, but the main lifecycle commands do not yet update those artifacts automatically. AOF still needs manual follow-up to keep self-hosting state fresh.
triage_notes: run/answer/outcome-report integration landed first, then signal, escalation-resolve, and council approval were added to confirmation memory. Next slice is deciding whether v1.9 should stop at this self-hosting coverage or extend to additional execution-stage sync and stronger task-triage cadence.
